title: Better GregTech And Applied Energistics
description: This mod currently introduces new components and machines for GregTech Modern and AE2.
body:
About the Mod

This mod currently introduces new components and machines for GregTech Modern and AE2.

Added Components and Machines
Expanded ME Pattern Provider
Functionality: Significantly enhances the original ME Pattern Provider.

Increased Capacity: The number of pattern slots has been increased from 27 to 81, and the catalyst slots have been expanded from 9 to 16.

Independent Programming: Each pattern slot now supports independent programming circuit configuration. Different patterns can use programming circuits with different IDs without interfering with each other.

ME Stock Input Assembly:
Combines the functionalities of the ME Stock Input Bus and ME Stock Input Chamber, allowing both functions to be handled by a single chamber.

Computing Core:
A single block that can simultaneously serve as an AE Crafting Storage and Parallel Processing Unit.

Advanced Assembly Line:
No longer requires sequential assembly and supports both ME Pattern Providers and parallel chambers.

Infinite Disk:
Introduces infinite disks for items and fluids, with a theoretical storage limit of Bigint.

Large Molecular Assembly Chamber:
A GT-style molecular assembly chamber designed to replace the original AE molecular assembler, supporting parallel bays - larger, better, more powerful.
